mdx.body:
import { Paragraph } from "../../../src/components/Mdx/textComponents" import CodeWrapper from "../../../src/components/Mdx/CodeWrapper" # Overflow #### How to use The overflow classes come in `overflow`, `overflow-x` and `overflow-y` varieties. The classes are: | Class | CSS rule | | :----------------- | :------------------- | | overflow-auto | overflow: auto; | | overflow-hidden | overflow: hidden; | | overflow-clip | overflow: clip; | | overflow-visible | overflow: visible; | | overflow-scroll | overflow: scroll; | | overflow-x-auto | overflow-x: auto; | | overflow-x-hidden | overflow-x: hidden; | | overflow-x-clip | overflow-x: clip; | | overflow-x-visible | overflow-x: visible; | | overflow-x-scroll | overflow-x: scroll; | | overflow-y-auto | overflow-y: auto; | | overflow-y-hidden | overflow-y: hidden; | | overflow-y-clip | overflow-y: clip; | | overflow-y-visible | overflow-y: visible; | | overflow-y-scroll | overflow-y: scroll; | These are all responsive and can be prefixed with the breakpoint clases. Let's jump into some Examples! ### Examples Here is the same div with a block of text (set to be a bit bigger than it's container) repeated 4 times, each time wiht a different overflow property:

Here's the above example, changing it's overflow to visible after the default lg (1024px) breakpoint, and auto below that, so if you're in a browser and resize your window you can see it change:
